Covering the computer beat

David Bloom The Los Angeles Daily News October 1994
Government & PoliticsBusiness & EconomyTechnology

This guide offers insights into investigating the acquisition and use of computer systems by businesses and government agencies, emphasizing potential pitfalls in contracts and decision-making processes.

T IRE. Journal and Uplink have run a lot of stories in recent years about using computers to improve your journalism... Part two will appear next month.
